# Fisique Fitness

> Premium personal training gym in Kokapet, Hyderabad offering 1:1 coaching, nutrition guidance, and sauna recovery.

## About
Fisique Fitness is Kokapet's premier personal training studio located on the 4th Floor, Above Pulla Reddy Sweets, Avant Cedar. We specialize in body transformations through personalized coaching, customized nutrition plans, and holistic recovery including on-site sauna therapy.

## Services
- Personal Training: 1:1 coaching with 90-day transformation programs
- Gym Membership: Flexible 1, 3, 6, and 12-month plans with premium equipment
- Nutrition Counseling: Customized diet plans included with PT packages
- Sauna Recovery: On-site sauna for post-workout muscle recovery

## Why Choose Fisique
- Boutique, uncrowded environment with personalized attention
- Certified personal trainers specializing in busy professionals
- Premium strength training and cardio equipment
- Holistic approach: training + nutrition + recovery
- 4.9★ rating with 91+ Google reviews

## Hours
Monday - Saturday: 5:30 AM - 10:00 PM
Sunday: Closed

## Location
Kokapet, Hyderabad - Near Financial District
Easily accessible from Narsingi, Gandipet, and Financial District areas
